raw_consumer_statement:
In XX/XX/XXXX, my account ( Account # XXXX ) was paid in full to a {$0.00} balance. 

In XX/XX/XXXX, an unauthorized charge for XXXX XXXX appeared on a statement under Account # XXXX I disputed this charge immediately, XX/XX/XXXX. Your investigation confirmed my dispute and reversed the charge from my XX/XX/XXXX statement under Account # XXXX. 

However, the same charge was re-added in XX/XX/XXXX under account ending in Account # XXXX, and the account has since been reported to the credit bureaus as past due.
